# The Sauna Guys

> Tampa's premier sauna and cold plunge wellness studio offering guided contrast therapy sessions.

## About

The Sauna Guys is a wellness studio located at 1703 North 24th Street, Tampa, FL 33605. We specialize in guided contrast therapy — alternating between sauna heat and cold plunge immersion for recovery, stress relief, and total body wellness.

## Services

- Guided Contrast Therapy: 60-minute coached sessions alternating sauna (180-200F) and cold plunge (38-42F)
- Private Rentals: Book the entire studio for private sessions
- First-Time Sessions: Introductory guided sessions for beginners
- Memberships: Monthly unlimited access plans
- Class Packs: Multi-session bundles (4, 8, 12 sessions)
- Gift Cards: Available in multiple denominations
